name: Whenever I see Thai iced coffee I think of her.

ingredients.item: This tea is creamy and sweet yet has the aroma and tang of tea leaves, thanks to the fermented
Ceylon tea. It is typically red in color, but now Thai tea manufacturers have taken to dying the

method: mix orange in keeping with what is seen as the characteristic color of Thai tea (like a very light
caramel or the color of the wood in an upscale men’s shoe store). Cha Tra Mue (cha-thai.com/en/)
is probably the most famous brand of tea mix in Thailand but if you can’t source it, substitutions
are listed below courtesy of thespruceeats.com.
